series.curator_notes: The Tabaluga series spans two distinct production eras: 1) The classic Europa Hörspiele (1997-2005) with episodes 01-26, each album containing two stories; and 2) The modern reboot (2021-2023) with episodes 1-7 as individual releases. Peter Maffay's catalog contains numerous Tabaluga music albums, musical recordings, and soundtracks that are not part of the Hörspiel series. The 'Tabaluga und Leo' (2003) album is a spinoff collaboration and not part of the numbered episode run.

splits.reason: 1997 original Hörspiel series with 40 tracks per album (2 episodes per release), different voice cast and production era from 2021+ series
2021+ re-recording series with new voice cast, modern production, 25-29 tracks per album (single episode), includes new theme songs
Spinoff series featuring Leo character, distinct from main numbered Tabaluga series
Film adaptation Hörspiele (abridged and unabridged versions), separate product from the episodic series

review.notes: This series contains TWO distinct Hörspiel productions: 1) Original 1997 series (40 tracks per album, 2 episodes each, different voice cast) and 2) 2021+ re-recording series (25-29 tracks per album, single episodes, new voice cast with modern production). These are clearly different products that parents would want to choose between. Also found: Tabaluga und Leo spinoff series (2003) and two film adaptation Hörspiele (2018) - all should be separate series entries. After splitting, episodes 8-26 from the 1997 series are excluded since only episodes 1-7 overlap with the 2021+ series. The 1997 series episodes 8-26 don't have 2021+ equivalents in the current data, but keeping them would create confusion with duplicate episode numbers across different productions.

verification.concerns:
CRITICAL: Unable to verify the curation. Every single album ID I attempted to look up (both included and excluded albums, spanning multiple samples) returned "not found" from the Spotify API. This indicates either: 1) The album IDs provided are incorrectly formatted or truncated, or 2) The Spotify data source being used is disconnected or returning errors. 

Without being able to verify even a single album, I cannot confirm that:
- The 33 included albums are actually valid Tabaluga Hörspiel episodes
- The 131 excluded albums are correctly excluded (though the exclusion reasons appear plausible based on titles)
- The 36 overrides are justified
- The 4 split proposals make sense

The review described a complex situation with two distinct production eras (1997 vs 2021+) that needed separation, which sounds reasonable in theory, but I cannot validate any of the specific album-level decisions without being able to access album metadata.

Additionally, I noticed the artist_id format issue: '5W3s4beu23rOlseCbVOp4l' is clearly not a valid Spotify artist ID (it's 22 characters, Spotify IDs are typically 22 characters but are alphanumeric strings, not this pattern). This further suggests data issues.
